overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(665148430)['wikidata'='Q8080254']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Alsancak railway station']['wikipedia:tr'='Alsancak Garı']; node(8009308045)['wikidata'='Q8080254']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Alsancak railway station']['wikipedia:tr'='Alsancak Garı']; node(8009308046)['wikidata'='Q8080254']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Alsancak railway station']['wikipedia:tr'='Alsancak Garı']; node(8009308047)['wikidata'='Q8080254']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Alsancak railway station']['wikipedia:tr'='Alsancak Garı']; node(8009308048)['wikidata'='Q8080254']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Alsancak railway station']['wikipedia:tr'='Alsancak Garı']; node(8084782905)['wikidata'='Q48964787']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Fahrettin Altay (Tram İzmir)']; node(8114039949)['wikidata'='Q48965019']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Üçkuyular (Tram İzmir)']; node(824442251)['wikidata'='Q216907']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Gelibolu']; way(238063586)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Eskişehir Osmangazi University']; way(260690210)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Fatih_Bridge']; way(263053265)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Sırımtaş Dam']; way(461789449)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:tr'='Ergene']; way(461789451)['wikidata'!~'.*']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:tr'='Ergene']; way(687828278)['wikidata'='Q5338336']['wikipedia'!~'.*']['wikipedia:en'='Grand_Synagogue_of_Edirne']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag from wikipedia tag in an outdated form']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
